# ASISecurity (asisecurity.ai)

> Pre-deployment security evidence for frontier AI.

Red-team results, threat models and hardening evidence for frontier and ASI-class systems — packaged as the security evidence pack regulators and customers demand.

## What this is
ASISecurity is a vertical in the CSOAI Hive — EU AI Act / NIS2 / DORA compliant tooling exposed as Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers callable by any AI agent.

## MCP tools
- ai-incident-reporting-mcp.report: File and track AI security incidents directly from any agent or pipeline.
- asisecurity-mcp.redteam: Launch automated red-team probes and collect signed evidence via MCP.

## Discovery
- Agent card: https://asisecurity.ai/agent.json
- MCP catalog: https://asisecurity.ai/.well-known/mcp.json
- Sitemap: https://asisecurity.ai/sitemap.xml
- Hive registry: https://csoai.org (271 published MCP servers)

## Pricing
See https://asisecurity.ai/pricing/
